scaled_oracle_cases.description: Row with extra columns (SampleID, Note) and missing Charge column; tests that extra columns are ignored and charge defaults to '0'.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that mapRow ignores extra columns and defaults charge to '0' when Charge column is absent.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Header includes extra columns 'SampleID' and 'Note', but not 'Charge'. The function must use header_dict to locate 'FullPeptideName', 'aggr_Fragment_Annotation', 'aggr_prec_Fragment_Annotation', and 'ProteinName' correctly, and set charge_state to '0' because 'Charge' is not in header_dict.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: A solution that assumes fixed column indices will raise IndexError or misinterpret data. A solution that does not check for 'Charge' presence may raise KeyError or skip charge default.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(this_row=row, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests with extra columns and missing Charge column.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Row with empty fragment annotations; function should return immediately without updating any mapping.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that mapRow returns immediately when fragment annotations are empty.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When 'aggr_Fragment_Annotation' is empty string, transitions list will be empty after split, and the function must return before updating any mappings.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Without the early return, the function might set precursors_mapping with empty list and still update sequences_mapping and protein_mapping, leading to incorrect entries.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(this_row=row, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for empty fragment annotations, charge NA/empty, and duplicate protein entries.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Row with Charge='NA'; should default to '0'.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that mapRow defaults charge to '0' when Charge is 'NA'.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If Charge == 'NA', charge_state must be set to '0' before constructing keys.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If charge is not defaulted, keys may be formed with 'NA', leading to incorrect mapping keys or KeyError.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(this_row=row, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for empty fragment annotations, charge NA/empty, and duplicate protein entries.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Row with Charge=''; should default to '0'.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that mapRow defaults charge to '0' when Charge is empty string.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: If Charge == '', charge_state must be set to '0' before constructing keys.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If charge is not defaulted, keys may be formed with empty string, leading to incorrect mapping keys.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(this_row=row, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for empty fragment annotations, charge NA/empty, and duplicate protein entries.

scaled_oracle_cases.description: Two rows mapping to the same protein; should avoid duplicate peptide entries in protein_mapping.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: Prove that mapRow avoids duplicate peptide entries in protein_mapping for the same protein.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: When multiple rows refer to the same protein, each peptide should appear only once in the protein's list. Duplicate peptide names from different rows should not be added twice.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: If duplicate check is missing, the same peptide will be appended multiple times upon repeated calls.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
mapRow(this_row=row1, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
mapRow(this_row=row2, header_dict=header_dict, precursors_mapping=precursors_mapping, sequences_mapping=sequences_mapping, protein_mapping=protein_mapping)
print('Precursors Mapping:', precursors_mapping)
print('Sequences Mapping:', sequences_mapping)
print('Protein Mapping:', protein_mapping)
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include tests for empty fragment annotations, charge NA/empty, and duplicate protein entries.
